description: Default auxiliary (fitting) basis sets per orbital basis. 'jk' is the Coulomb(+exchange) fitting basis used for SCF density fitting; 'corr' is the correlation (RI/C) fitting basis used for RI-MP2 / DF-CCSD. Names are matched case-insensitively against the orbital basis name. Entries may omit a key, in which case the corresponding default below is used. Unknown orbital bases fall back to the defaults.

policy.description: Thresholds for the automatic (--ri auto) acceleration policy.
